message:
test(oracle): add 11 more conformance test suites (299 total)

New suites: vdbe_where_affinity, update_patterns_extended, printf_width_prec,
multi_aggregate, cross_join_cartesian, derived_table, replace_overwrite,
insert_conflict, hex_zeroblob, numeric_functions, savepoint.

All 299 conformance oracle tests pass with 0 mismatches.
